title: Prometheus Head Series and Chunks Approaching Limit
dataSources: Prometheus TSDB head stats metrics ingested as Splunk metrics
spl:
| mstats latest(_value) AS head_series WHERE index=prometheus metric_name="prometheus_tsdb_head_series" span=5m BY instance
| where head_series > 1500000
| sort - head_series
description: Large heads increase memory pressure and OOM risk during compactions.
value: Gives capacity owners lead time to shard or drop high-cardinality metrics.
visualization: Area chart (head series), Gauge vs limit.
knownFalsePositives: Noisy periods after retention, target, or scrape changes. We compare with the Grafana or Prometheus view for the same minutes.
grandmaExplanation: We read the forwarder and buffer logs for stress and give-ups so we see log loss risk before disks or patience run out.
